Tentang Saya

About Me

I am an Information Systems graduate from Universitas Terbuka with more than four years of experience in warehousing, inventory control, security, material distribution, operational administration, and data management.

My combination of hands-on warehouse operations experience and an educational background in information systems enables me to understand workflows firsthand while maintaining a structured approach to accurate data management and administration.

Full Name Adhiim Ghaniiyu Ulul Hakiim
Place and Date of Birth Tuban, 03 July 1998
Education S1 Sistem Informasi
Status Available for Hire

History

Education

2022 – 2026

Universitas Terbuka

S1 — Sistem Informasi

Graduated with a GPA of 3.25/4.00. Completed core courses including Databases, Computer Networks, Systems Analysis & Design, Network Security, Web-based Programming, and Information Technology Governance. Final research focused on the implementation of artificial intelligence in financial trading information systems.

Career

Work Experience

Jan 2024 – Nov 2024

Security

PT Secure Garuda Indonesia · WTC Surabaya, East Java

Experienced in securing 16–20 operational points within a shopping center across a 3-shift rotation to maintain a safe and orderly environment. Proven ability to swiftly resolve visitor altercations, manage emergency medical evacuations, and collaborate effectively within a 10–11 personnel team while coordinating with supervisors and law enforcement in accordance with public security procedures.

Sep 2019 – Mar 2023

Warehouse Operator

PT Astra Honda Motor · Bekasi Regency, West Java

Experienced in managing the distribution and inventory of thousands of spare parts (including small, electric, big, export, and plastic parts) at Plant 3 to support 3 automotive production lines with a capacity of 1,000–1,200 units per shift. Proven track record in conducting periodic stock takes, mitigating supply chain bottlenecks due to production planning shifts, and coordinating with receiving teams for urgent material prioritization, while actively training new operators within a large-scale team of 80–100 personnel per shift.

Feb 2019 – Aug 2019

Security

PT Sigap Prima Astrea · Manggarai Station, South Jakarta

Experienced in securing KRL Commuter Line trips on the Jakarta – Bogor round-trip (PP) route, managing approximately 3 round trips per operational shift to ensure passenger safety and order. Proven ability to swiftly handle reported harassment incidents, maintain onboard situational stability within a 4-personnel security team, and seamlessly coordinate with destination station guards adhering to public transportation safety protocols.

Jun 2016 – Des 2016

Resto Manager

Resto Serba Sambal · Lamongan, East Java

Experienced in managing daily operations, financial administration, and raw material inventory control for a restaurant with a capacity of more than 50 customers and a daily turnover of ± Rp4,000,000. Proven analytical skills in stock evaluation, proactive supply chain bottleneck mitigation, and team leadership for 8 personnel, including managing payroll and attendance records.

Work

Portfolio

A collection of Information Systems projects, Kaggle data analytics, & GitHub repositories.

Capstone Project

Web-Based E-Commerce Application

Developed a web-based e-commerce application featuring user authentication, product management, shopping cart, and online transactions with a responsive interface.

Basis Data

PhpMyAdmin

Designing and managing efficient databases to ensure data integrity, security, and high system performance.

Analis & Visualisasi Data

RStudio

Transforming raw data into meaningful insights through data analysis, interactive visualization, and dashboards for better decision-making.

Network administration

Cisco NAT Project

Konfigurasi Network Address Translation (NAT) with Cisco Packet Tracer.

Network Security

Snort IDS

Implementation of an Intrusion Detection System (IDS) using Snort to detect network threats.

Java Programming

Java-Based Simple Point of Sale (POS) System

Developed a simple Java-based POS application to manage sales transactions, automate calculations, and improve data recording efficiency.

Mobile Application Development

Basic Mobile Application

Developed a basic mobile application to demonstrate fundamental mobile programming concepts, focusing on user interface and core application functionality.

Research Paper

Trading AI: Implementation of Artificial Intelligence in Financial Trading Information Systems

A research paper exploring the implementation of Artificial Intelligence in financial trading information systems to enhance data analysis, process automation, and decision-making.

Data Analytics

Kaggle Data Analysis

Data analysis training (data cleaning, EDA, visualization) using a dataset from Kaggle.
